page_content: Intermediate Courses Choose three courses total from at least two areas of the following: Painting: ARTT320 Elements of Painting Sculpture: ARTT330 Elements of Sculpture: Metal Casting ARTT331 Elements of Sculpture: Steel ARTT333 Elements of Sculpture: Wood and Mixed Media Printmaking: ARTT340 ARTT341 Elements of Printmaking: Woodcut and Relief ARTT343 Elements of Printmaking: Screen Printing Digital Media: ARTT370 Elements of Digital Media Advanced Courses Select one 3xx-level ARTT elective Select one 4xx-level ARTT elective Select one 4xx-level ARTT or Art Theory elective Supporting Area 200 level or above ARTH which satisﬁes a GenEd Diversity Requirement 200 level or above ARTH which satisﬁes a GenEd Diversity Requirement Select two 3xx-/4xx-level ARTH or Art Theory electives 1 Select an Advanced Specializaton: 1 Digital Media Painting Printmaking Sculpture Intermedia Total Credits 1 Advanced media courses ending in 8 or 9 are repeatable up to 12 credits. 9 3 3 3 3 3 6 12 60
